base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should reduce pullback_long deep-heat entries and improve average/worst MAE without touching fallback routing or option-confirmed profiles. Main risk is cutting profitable score-3 pullbacks, so reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, pullback PnL drops materially, or trade count falls more than 10%.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_c_pullback_long_distance as a narrow upstream-entry experiment on the only profile that both dominates profit and owns the latest worst MAE. The latest pullback_long produced 31 trades, $2294.6 PnL, 249.7 PnL/exposure hour, but also worst MAE -392. Broad hidden signatures were destructive, so this is a small profile-specific structure test rather than global veto tightening or runtime exits. Data-state classification is available; this only touches VALID_0DTE pullback_long and leaves MISSING/STALE/1DTE routing unchanged.
